# LoveAds

> Love Ads Marketing SRL (loveads.ro) is a Romania-based company offering product
> strategy consulting and LoveAds Copilot, a profit-analytics SaaS for e-commerce
> advertisers. Copilot unifies Google Ads, Meta Ads and Shopify data to show real
> profit (POAS), detect money leaks, and recommend prioritized actions in plain language.

## About the company

- Legal name: Love Ads Marketing SRL
- Registration: CUI RO39641531, J40/10343/2018
- Location: Șos. București Nord Nr. 10E, Voluntari, Ilfov, Romania
- Contact: sebastian.cosmor@loveads.ro
- Website: https://loveads.ro

## Products & services

- [Product strategy consulting](https://loveads.ro/): helping founders and product teams
  define what to build, plan how to build it, and align on a clear strategy before development.
- [LoveAds Copilot](https://loveads.ro/copilot/): a profit copilot for Google Ads, Meta and
  Shopify. The live app is at https://copilot.loveads.ro.

## What LoveAds Copilot does

LoveAds Copilot answers three questions and closes the loop on every decision:

1. What happened — unified, de-duplicated profit across all channels (Google Ads, Meta, Shopify).
2. Why — the reasons behind changes, including account change history.
3. What to do next — prioritized actions with the euro impact, in plain English.
4. Did it work — every action is tracked and reviewed, building a playbook of what works.

Key concepts:
- POAS (Profit on Ad Spend): revenue minus real product cost, used instead of vanity ROAS so
  advertisers optimize for actual profit.
- Money-leak detection: surfaces overspending campaigns, disapproved products and tracking
  breaks, each with the euro at risk per week and a fix.
- Decision loop: Detect → Recommend → Act → Review → Learn — institutional memory plus an
  accountable AI that grades its own past predictions.
- Read-only and secure: Copilot reads ad and store data via OAuth to advise; it never edits
  campaigns, products, or checkout.

## Pricing

- Founding — €99/month — first 100 customers, price locked for life.
- Growth — €199/month — €5k–25k monthly ad spend; adds Meta, Search & Product Intelligence.
- Scale — €399/month — €25k–100k spend; adds TikTok, Creative Intelligence, Advanced AAR.
- Pro — €799/month — €100k–500k spend; multi-brand, multi-store, forecasting, priority support.

Self-serve sign-up with card payment (Stripe); 14-day trial.

## Who it's for

- E-commerce brands and store owners running their own Google Ads, Meta and Shopify.
- Marketing agencies managing multiple clients (portfolio view + per-client intelligence).
